footer.copyright: NexoPost is a brand of Uptexx Information Technologies.

privacy_content.text: 1. Data Controller Identity

NexoPost is a social media management platform operated by Kuzey Tech Bilgi Teknolojileri. We determine the purposes and means of processing personal data and are responsible for establishing and managing the data recording system in accordance with GDPR, KVKK, and Meta Platform Policies.
2. Information We Collect

We collect the following categories of information: (a) Account information: your name, email address, and password when you register. (b) Billing information: company name, billing address, and payment method details processed securely via our payment provider. (c) Social media account data: when you connect a social media account (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, TikTok), we receive and store OAuth access tokens, your public profile name, profile picture URL, and account/page identifiers necessary to perform posting on your behalf. We do NOT collect your social media passwords.
3. Meta Platform Data (Facebook & Instagram)

When you connect your Facebook or Instagram account, NexoPost requests access to: pages_manage_posts (to publish posts to your Facebook Pages), pages_show_list and pages_read_engagement (to list your managed Pages and read engagement metrics), instagram_content_publish (to publish media to your Instagram Business Account), instagram_business_basic (to read your Instagram profile information), and business_management (to access your Business Manager assets). This data is used solely to provide the scheduling and publishing features you request. We do not use Meta platform data for advertising, profiling, or any purpose other than delivering our core service.
4. How We Use Your Data

Your data is used to: create and manage your NexoPost account, authenticate with social media platforms on your behalf, schedule and publish posts to your connected accounts at your requested times, display your account information within the NexoPost dashboard, process subscription payments, provide customer support, and improve our platform.
5. Data Sharing and Third Parties

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data or Meta platform data with third-party advertisers or data brokers. Your data may be processed by our infrastructure providers (Vercel for hosting, Neon/PostgreSQL for database storage) strictly for service delivery purposes under data processing agreements. We may disclose data if required by law or to protect our legal rights.
6. Security of Social Media Tokens

OAuth access tokens obtained from Meta, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, and TikTok are stored encrypted in our database. Tokens are transmitted only over HTTPS. We limit token access to the minimum permissions required for our service. You can revoke any connected account at any time from your NexoPost Connections page, which immediately removes the stored tokens from our system.
7. Data Retention and Deletion

Your account data and social media tokens are retained as long as your subscription is active. If you disconnect a social media account from NexoPost, the associated tokens are deleted immediately. Upon account deletion, all your personal data and tokens are permanently deleted within 30 days. To request deletion of your data, email us at info@nexopost.com with the subject 'Data Deletion Request'.
8. Facebook & Instagram Data Deletion

In compliance with Meta Platform Policy, you may request deletion of all data NexoPost has received through Facebook or Instagram at any time. To do so: (1) Disconnect your Facebook/Instagram account from NexoPost Settings → Connections, or (2) Send a deletion request to info@nexopost.com. You can also revoke NexoPost's access directly from your Facebook Settings → Apps and Websites. Upon revocation, we will delete all associated platform data within 30 days.
9. User Rights (GDPR & KVKK)

You have the right to: access the personal data we hold about you, request correction of inaccurate data, request deletion of your data, withdraw consent and revoke OAuth tokens at any time, object to automated processing, and lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. To exercise these rights, contact us at info@nexopost.com.
10. Cookie Usage

We use strictly necessary cookies for session management and authentication. We use analytical cookies to understand how users interact with our platform. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. We do not use cookies for cross-site advertising tracking.
11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by email or via an in-app notification. The date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last revised.
12. Contact Us

For questions regarding this privacy policy, your personal data rights, or to submit a data deletion request, contact us at: Email: info@nexopost.com | Company: Kuzey Tech Bilgi Teknolojileri | Platform: https://serkangunacti-nexopost.vercel.app

terms_content.text: 1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing NexoPost, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you are prohibited from using the platform.
2. Scope of Service

NexoPost is a cloud-based dashboard allowing users to connect multiple social media accounts, schedule posts, and view consolidated analytics. Functionality depends strictly on official third-party API availability.
3. Fair Use & API API Limits

Users must adhere strictly to fair usage policies and the official API rate limits established by partner platforms (e.g., Meta, TikTok, YouTube). Abusive scheduling attempting to bypass these limitations is strictly prohibited.
4. Prohibited Conduct and Spam

NexoPost cannot be used to disseminate illegal, unsolicited, hateful, graphic, or spam content. NexoPost acts as a proxy; any legal responsibility for published content lies exclusively with the account user.
5. Intellectual Property Rights
All trademarks, platform code structure, dashboard UI, and the NexoPost brand name are intellectual properties of Uptexx Information Technologies and cannot be replicated.
6. Subscriptions, Payments and Refunds

Every user is entitled to a 15-day free trial. Subsequent paid access (Basic, Pro, Agency) relies on digital service delivery. As digital SaaS goods cannot be returned, standard recurring payments are generally non-refundable unless legally mandated.
7. Disclaimer of Warranties
NexoPost is provided 'AS IS'. We do not guarantee 100% bug-free operation or uninterrupted uptime, especially considering changes implemented unilaterally by social media APIs.
8. Termination of Accounts
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts engaging in fraudulent activities, reverse engineering, or repeated violations of platform constraints without prior notice.
9. Dispute Resolution

Any disputes arising from these Terms of Service shall be governed by the laws applicable regarding digital commerce, primarily subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the regional courts near our headquarters.
10. Modifications to Terms
NexoPost reserves the right to revise these Terms at any time without explicit notice. The prevailing document will always be accessible via this URL.

features_page.subtitle: Dive deep into the specific modules that make NexoPost the ultimate automation and orchestration tool for social media.
features_page.detail_text: Detailed below are the core mechanics of how this module accelerates your digital workflow.
sync: Connect all platforms: X (Twitter), Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Bluesky, Pinterest, and YouTube.
One central compose window for multiple destinations, eliminating copy-pasting.
Auto-Scale Media artificially scales your graphics (1:1 for IG, 9:16 for TT) flawlessly.
Platform-specific previews guarantee your content looks perfect natively before publishing.
multi: Isolate client workspaces into distinct 'Brands' or 'Projects' under one login.
Toggle instantly between 10+ different companies without logging out and back in.
Centralized billing for the agency owner while deploying dedicated analytics per brand.
Keep tokens securely isolated; post to Brand A's Twitter without mixing it up with Brand B's.
schedule: Queue weeks' worth of posts inside the visual Drag-and-Drop Calendar.
Set custom times for specific time zones to reach global audiences.
Save posts as Drafts for your copywriters or clients to review before hitting Schedule.
Leverage 'Evergreen' queues to recycle your best-performing posts indefinitely.
analytics: Consolidate data from giant networks like Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn into a single unified pot.
Say goodbye to complex spreadsheets; track your audience growth, reach, and engagement with visual charts.
Discover the exact times of day your content performs best and optimize your publishing schedule flawlessly.
Export sleek, White-Label PDF reports (branded with your agency's logo) to present to your clients in seconds.
ai: Generate scratch-written captions perfectly tailored to your brand's unique tone of voice (formal, witty, provocative) via ChatGPT integration.
Upload a single image and let our vision system deeply analyze it to instantly generate matching text and tags.
Automatically recommend the most powerful, trending hashtags guaranteed to multiply your post's organic reach.
Break language barriers: Professionally translate your post captions into over 30 languages with a single click.
inbox: Manage all incoming comments from Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok on a single chronological screen without getting lost in tabs.
Conversational Commerce: Respond instantly to potential buyers inquiring about products under specific posts.
Crisis Management: Neutralize trolling or complaints in real-time to aggressively protect your brand reputation.
Team Collaboration: Instantly assign a specific comment ticket to your sales or customer support team for rapid resolution.
